videos.title: He said my name.
videos.description:
If you live stream, please do this little thing. It can make someone's day!

Shout out to Darren Rowse from ProBlogger for being a huge inspiration for me all those years ago!

#livestreaming #contentcreator #audienceengagement

videos.title: Steal this one tweak to go live faster.
videos.description:
Ask yourself this before every stream.

If it were easy, what would it look like?

#livestreaming #contentcreator #videotips

videos.title: Here's a tip so your next live won't have dead air.
videos.description:
Steal the "back pocket story" trick.

It saved a Steve Jobs keynote mid-fail.

Try it before your next stream.

#livestreaming #contentcreator #storytelling

videos.title: What’s your biggest content ICK?
videos.description:

videos.title: Short videos are the smallest piece.
videos.description: We did it! We made it to the end of the 14 day challenge, but this is just the beginning! Type DAY 14 DONE below if you've uploaded today's video, and also tell me what the biggest learning moment was for you. Also, be sure to catch me live tomorrow (Tuesday, April 21st) at 10am PT (1pm ET) on the PatFlynn YouTube channel (@PatFlynn) to learn more about how what you're doing with short form video fits into a much larger picture for the brand you're creating, and the Superfans that you're earning
